query: Can you help me plan a 7-day trip for 3 people? We will be departing from Reno and intend to visit 3 cities in Washington, between March 15th and March 21st, 2022. Given our new budget of $3,400, we would like to secure entire rooms for accommodations and refrain from flying during our journey. Our culinary preferences encompass Mediterranean, Indian, American, and French cuisines to enjoy on the trip.
